description: Pipeline trigger endpoint contract. Returns plain-text responses — not JSON envelopes.
note: BatchController is @Profile(!sandbox). The contracttest profile satisfies this condition.

responses.description: Pipeline triggered with no concurrent run in progress
responses.guardsAgainst: Changing the success response body or returning a JSON envelope instead of plain text, breaking scripts that depend on the exact completion message.

responses.description: POST fired while pipeline is already running (AtomicBoolean guard active)
responses.guardsAgainst: Dropping the 409 conflict semantics for concurrent runs, hiding orchestration collisions from callers.

responses.description: Pipeline throws a runtime exception (e.g. reconciliation mismatch)
responses.guardsAgainst: Masking runtime failures behind a success-looking response or a differently shaped error body.
